tasks.title: Define Narada-native launch command posture
tasks.goal: Extend operator-facing Narada-native launch output toward admitted dry-run and live launch planning.
tasks.context: Launch affordances are projections and entrypoints, not authority loci.
required_work: Expose runtime kind, carrier session id, startup command, capability posture, withheld authorities, launch evidence refs, and execution admission state.
Support dry-run launch planning without executing live providers.
Add tests proving launch output contains no raw secrets, prompts, provider config values, or model output.
non_goals: Do not make launch visibility a capability grant.
Do not infer volatile handles from labels.
Do not require an operator UI rewrite.
acceptance_criteria: Launch output has bounded runtime, session, capability, authority, and evidence fields.
Dry-run planning is available without live provider calls.
Tests prove output is redacted and non-authoritative.

tasks.title: Define Narada-native doctor command
tasks.goal: Provide a compact Narada-native doctor command over supervisor and readiness surfaces.
tasks.context: Operators need configured, blocked, fixture-only, provider-backed, live, failed, and stopped posture without private file inspection.
required_work: Wrap supervisor doctor and readiness into JSON and human output.
Report runtime posture, provider posture, data posture, consent posture, blocked reasons, latest evidence refs, reconstruction status, and next diagnostic command.
Add tests distinguishing configured, blocked, fixture-only, provider-backed, live-running, failed, and stopped states.
non_goals: Do not expose raw provider configuration or credential values.
Do not treat doctor output as task truth.
acceptance_criteria: Doctor command returns compact bounded JSON/human output.
Tests prove doctor output does not expose secrets or raw model text.

tasks.title: Add bounded evidence-ref projection
tasks.goal: Project Narada-native evidence refs without raw transcript, prompt, provider output, or credential leakage.
tasks.context: Operator surfaces need enough evidence refs for reconstruction, not private payload display.
required_work: List evidence refs by family, status, path, and recency only.
Redact or omit raw transcript, prompt, provider output, credential, and secret-like values.
Add tests with secret-like fixture data proving raw values are omitted.
non_goals: Do not inline full evidence payloads.
Do not expose raw provider output.
Do not read credential stores for display.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence refs are bounded by family, status, path, and recency.
Secret-like and raw model values are omitted.

tasks.title: Add operator-surface affordance projection
tasks.goal: Expose launch and doctor availability through operator-surface projections without authority collapse.
tasks.context: Buttons and labels may point to canonical commands but must not themselves become grants or mutation authority.
required_work: Define launch/doctor availability and posture projection records.
Ensure projected commands point to canonical surfaces rather than direct mutation primitives.
Add tests proving launch/focus convenience does not imply authority or capability grants.
non_goals: Do not implement a full UI rewrite.
Do not grant capabilities through buttons or labels.
Do not infer runtime locus from volatile window handles.
acceptance_criteria: Operator-surface projections expose launch and doctor affordances with canonical command targets.
Projection records separate convenience from authority.
Tests prove no capability grants are implied.

tasks.title: Add repair guidance and refusal posture
tasks.goal: Provide bounded operator guidance for blocked Narada-native launch and doctor states.
tasks.context: Blocked states should guide the operator without automatically repairing authority-bearing substrate.
required_work: Cover missing registration, missing consent, revoked grant, missing runtime, stale heartbeat, and unavailable provider transport.
Return bounded repair guidance and next diagnostic commands.
Add tests proving no automatic repair mutation occurs.
non_goals: Do not rotate credentials, edit consent, start daemons, or mutate tasks automatically.
Do not print raw secret values in guidance.
Do not bypass canonical capability consent.
acceptance_criteria: Blocked states produce bounded guidance and diagnostics.
Tests cover all required blocked states.

tasks.title: Add end-to-end operator readback proof
tasks.goal: Prove dry-run launch, start or heartbeat evidence, doctor readback, and reconstruction link by carrier session id.
tasks.context: Operator-facing use should be proven without live provider network calls.
required_work: Run dry-run launch planning for fixture and provider-configured paths.
Link start or heartbeat evidence, doctor readback, and reconstruction by carrier session id.
Add tests proving bounded output and no live provider network calls.
non_goals: Do not require live provider credentials.
Do not send outbound effects or publish repositories.
Do not close proof by transcript inspection alone.
acceptance_criteria: Dry-run launch, evidence, doctor, and reconstruction are linked by carrier session id.
Fixture and provider-configured paths are covered.
Tests pass without live provider network calls or raw secrets.
